title: matelea lesueurii
intro: Matelea lesueurii, also known as the "Coral Honeysuckle", is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea lesueurii are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Matelea lesueurii are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or oil, and are often used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
